getmaxun/maxun#870.title: Bug: Settings show only one limit for robots with multiple list actions

getmaxun/maxun#988.body: The reload button in the recorder browser is currently not working, so users cannot reload the page during recording. This functionality needs to be enabled.
getmaxun/maxun#988.title: Bug: Enable recorder browser reload

getmaxun/maxun#990.body: Each robot type (Scrape, Crawl, Search) outputs data in different formats, but currently only the Scrape robot has an "Output Formats" configuration option. The same output format selection should be added to the Crawl robot and the Search robot's "Extract Data from Results" mode along with the functionality.
getmaxun/maxun#990.title: Feature: Add Output Format Selection to Crawl and Search Robots
